textByHashes.960d1f342e323df3b8e3f653245ac40504dcc8ba: Bah! Puny humans always try steal Lallis' golden apples! You go away now!
textByHashes.381c28b9d52344fe25b5ccd3edd6003275457319: Ha! You not fool me human! Me am smart! Other trolls so jealous of how brainy I are, they kick me out of camp and make me live down here in cave! But me have last funny!
textByHashes.ea456504bb3b5a816d5eb485b995c8c946909a9a: Me find golden apples on tree and me build wall to stop anyone who not Lalli eating lovely golden apples! Did me not tell you I are smart?
textByHashes.cc78ee17f6c24a0aab915d8e5952113621f54314: Hum, me think you not really think I are clever. Me think you is trying trick Lalli. Me not like you as much as other human. He give me present. I give him wool.
textByHashes.4e4ddb6e3f81b736cb0bf1e272e0a533ae43a5ad: Human call itself Askeladden! It not trick Lalli, Lalli do good deal with human! Stupid human get some dumb wool, but did not get golden apples!
textByHashes.cddc85ba3b4cd815bcb56f7d07a9d1728be2158a: Grrr! Why you insult me stupid human? Me know it are because you jealous of Lalli's huge brain and you try steal apples!
textByHashes.3ff3255a6d67860ed63b4de894db808d371c9065: Ha! You stupid human! You think you trick Lalli? Me know you want my golden apples Well! You not get them! [laugh][laugh]!
textByHashes.f0355ae8febb3f966c8db04987302971be08dea3: Hah! You think me stupid or something human? Me already got one! Me don't want lotta baby rocks either, so me don't want another one around the place!
textByHashes.852eb4c31c9b3c300ab17d537beaed5ff448453b: Stupid human think he can trick me into giving away some golden apples! Hah! Golden apples is all me got to eat, you not get them, no way!
textByHashes.e105e403620d91ad89c8d370d64934244a5992aa: Unless you got tasty food for Lalli. Then I might trade you for it.
textByHashes.0ea94dad8b736e0b6a91b7924276f031338dd5f5: Hah! Me knew it! You human just try trick Lalli into giving away golden apple! Me not as stupid as you look!
textByHashes.dd4b48377566ec5da6455e49929a06415f1293be: Hmm... YUM! That are delicious! Me never know human know to make soup out of stone? It some special stone?
textByHashes.7e9d674da92f5f2b6dc1f330ca1a1461d423755d: Let me think about that, me like to think.
textByHashes.2575640623c19819c86dc2e501f824b610652ec5: Your soup very tasty, human! But me still not want trade golden apples for your stone. Me think pet rock get jealous.
textByHashes.be9df10e85ca600d3a4e85bac040a02429ea346c: Gee, sorry human, all you have do is ask, me not need you to shout. You act like you think Lalli am stupid or something...
textByHashes.e2fe34ddb58dfa25d93ceda7a4a1f0d2e6ec5cf2: Here you go. Hah! Me trick you human! All you got is worthless golden fleece! Me got very rare soup-making stone!
textByHashes.f452f6999582c0acce0505055e45c92376a4e399: Hey human! You not put things in Lalli's food unless Lalli ask you to! It am very impolite, even for human!
textByHashes.aad9f6c5e1791fb3ce31ab7ba9080809ae9a2e62: Hey human! You not go in my house! It where me keep all my stuff!
textByHashes.6a77a9a309e25a75fa7fb25c64a8b1bf39a9850e: Ha! Stupid human! You no get any golden apples! Even though me much like stone soup!
textByHashes.7eaaed79fd8c2ffc64aa6a9cacb0f04c0742e64e: Me will sell you some golden wool, but me not sell you any golden apples!
textByHashes.64ceaf1c3db80dcd4c3ecb2df9bef420fd542361: Me want 1000 coins! You pay or go!
textByHashes.740d56979d8a43636178234bb9ceeb8a5eb2fd36: Ha! Stupid human think he buy golden apples, but actually get stupid wool! [laugh][laugh]!
textByHashes.43c060ed631fd96b478dc05f95b4055f819f54c5: Well stupid bad trade human don't get no wool then! Or any golden apples!
textByHashes.9aaef9ba7a2abc8ded56d83f8bca55409ccb5ff1: You no pay, then you go! You no get any golden apples!
textByHashes.00fc0defd6a80d739060bedb1f3736f6b268b7f3: Hey human! You not go back on deal! Me know you stupid at trades but that stone mine now! All soup mine!
